the_fixer.name: The Fixer
the_fixer.visual_prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic medium shot of a ruggedly handsome man in his early 30s. Sharp jawline, messy dark hair, 3-day scruffy stubble. Worn charcoal grey henley shirt, sleeves rolled up, vascular forearms. Dramatic garage chiaroscuro lighting, cool blue backlights, warm key light. Shot on Arri Alexa, 85mm lens, f/1.8, 8k resolution. Intense and competent expression.

the_siren.name: The Siren
the_siren.visual_prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic medium shot of a stunningly attractive woman in her mid 20s. Fit, voluptuous physique. Tight white thermal waffle-knit shirt, unbuttoned at top. Glowing sun-kissed skin, long tousled beach-wave hair. Looking directly at camera with playful flirtatious smirk. Golden hour sunset lighting, halo-like around hair. Shot on Kodak Portra 400, 50mm lens, high fashion color grading.
